zh.title: 布拉瓦茨基预言全集 - 神智学创始人的15条预言与验证 | Blavatsky Prophecies
zh.description: 俄国神秘学家海伦娜·布拉瓦茨基（1831-1891），神智学会创始人，《秘密教义》《揭开伊西斯的面纱》作者。她对原子可分性、周期性文明、精神进化等领域的预言整理与验证。
zh.keywords: 布拉瓦茨基,海伦娜·布拉瓦茨基,神智学,秘密教义,揭开伊西斯的面纱,Blavatsky,Theosophy,预言,神秘学,灵性进化
zh.ogTitle: 布拉瓦茨基预言全集 | Blavatsky Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 神智学创始人海伦娜·布拉瓦茨基的15条预言完整收录与验证分析。涵盖科学预见、灵性进化、文明周期等领域。
zh.twitterDescription: 15条神智学创始人布拉瓦茨基的预言，含真实度验证。她在1888年预言原子可分，比电子发现早9年。

en.title: Blavatsky Prophecies - 15 Predictions from the Theosophical Founder (1831-1891) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: Helena Blavatsky (1831-1891), Russian mystic and founder of the Theosophical Society, author of 'The Secret Doctrine' and 'Isis Unveiled'. Her predictions on atomic divisibility, cyclical civilizations, spiritual evolution, and more — compiled and verified.
en.keywords: Helena Blavatsky,Blavatsky predictions,Theosophy,Secret Doctrine,Isis Unveiled,occultism,spiritual evolution,root races,esoteric prophecy
en.ogTitle: Blavatsky Prophecies - The Theosophical Founder's Complete Predictions
en.ogDescription: 15 prophecies from Helena Blavatsky (1831-1891), founder of the Theosophical Society. Full archive with verification covering science, spiritual evolution, and civilization cycles.
en.twitterDescription: 15 predictions from Helena Blavatsky, Theosophical founder. She predicted atoms are divisible in 1888, nine years before the electron was discovered.
